title: European TCC Perspectives
description: No sources from European TCC national perspectives (France, Italy, Spain). Their motivations, constraints, and national caveats are undocumented in the current corpus.

title: Maritime Task Force Documentation
description: UNIFIL's Maritime Task Force is the UN's only naval peacekeeping component. Dedicated documentation on its operations, mandate interpretation, and lessons is absent from the corpus.

title: Lebanese and Arab Perspectives
description: The corpus is heavily weighted toward Israeli institutional sources and Western academic analysis. Lebanese, Arab, and Shia community perspectives on UNIFIL are significantly underrepresented.

title: UNIFIL Internal Primary Sources
description: SG reports, Force Commander assessments, and internal UNIFIL policy documents are largely absent. These would provide the institutional voice of the mission itself.
